name: forge_doctrine_check
description: Verify that every rule-id cited via Finding.citing(...) in the workspace resolves to an existing rule in the doctrine database. Catches typos, references to deprecated rules, and orphan citations. Non-zero exit if any citation fails to resolve. Run this in CI on every commit per AVP-Doctrine rule docs-005.

source_dir.description: Source tree to scan. Defaults to 'crates/' under the forge root.

json.description: Emit JSON instead of human-readable text.
